ABOUT ME · NORTHERN WISCONSIN · 45.3° N

Northern
Roots.

I was born in Northern Wisconsin. I met the love of my life, moved to Norway, and started over with about $1,000 and a long-horizon mindset.

SCROLL DOWN ↓

THE CROSSING · WISCONSIN → NORWAY

The
Crossing.

From lake country to fjord country, this is the bridge between where I started and where I build today. Different landscape, same values: resilience, discipline, and practical execution.

ABOUT THE LAB · OSLO REGION · 59.9° N

Signal Over
Hype Lab.

I work for Microsoft and I am building a home outside Oslo. The Lab is where field lessons become clear architecture patterns you can explain and operate when the pressure is on.
